title: Debug mob sprites and entity count

log.context: Debug mob sprites and entity count

All fixes applied and injected. Here's a summary of what was done:

---

**Issue 1 (sprites still red circles) — Fixed:**
- Root cause: Plain `function drawSprite_X()` declarations in a non-module `<script>` tag should technically become window globals, but weren't reliably accessible via `window['drawSprite_X']` in all browser configurations.
- Fix: Added explicit `window.drawSprite_X = drawSprite_X` registration lines at the end of `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/clungiverse/mob-sprites.js` for ...(truncated)
